field_values.action_summary: A group of Apache warriors approaches the cave entrance. They find the protagonist but are interrupted by a terrifying, low moaning sound emanating from the depths. The warriors flee in panic; one warrior falls to his death during the retreat.
field_values.emotional_beat: From curiosity/investigation to primal terror and chaos.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the gorge/entrance; Handheld/Shaky cam for panic; Low angle shots of approach
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Distance between apache_warriors and cave mouth
Timing of moaning sound relative to character reaction
Directional source of audio from cave depths
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the supernatural threat of the cave through auditory and psychological terror, forcing a chaotic retreat of the apache_warriors.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (immobile observer)
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_canyon (floor, threshold, ledge/drop-off)

## Continuity Constraints
- Distance between apache_warriors and cave mouth
- Timing and direction of the "moaning" sound relative to character reactions
- Verticality of the fall during retreat

## Beat List
- BT001: apache_warriors approach the cave entrance
- BT002: terrifying low moaning sound emanates from depths
- BT003: warriors flee in panic; one falls to death
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
